Submit a report with a violation 2. View the violation message displayed on the report 3. Attempt to click and drag the mouse to select the text, or double-click a word to highlight it ## Expected Result: Users should be able to select the text in system/violation messages Standard text selection behavior should work (click + drag, double-click to select word, etc.) Users should be able to copy the message text ## Actual Result: The message text cannot be selected or highlighted. title: [$250] Refactor code to keep navigation handling in the UI components

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
Coming from https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/82005#discussion_r2896647130 cc @jjcoffee # Problem There are functions in E/App that have a parameter called `shouldHandleNavigation`. This is a bad code smell because: 1. Navigation is not the job of lib/actions (it's a job of the view that is calling the action) 2. Functions should normally not have boolean parameters 3. Actions should only be reponsible for making API requests and handling the changes to Onyx data # Solution Refactor the code so that the navigation happens in the component view and not in the action files.
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @linhvovan29546

title: [HOLD App/pull/80209] [$250] Refactor `getPolicyExpenseReportOption()` to change `privateIsArchived` parameter to boolean

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
coming from https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/80209/changes#diff-010911fd56cd74ff46fd42cd2a137e01f8a050eaf4a038d837ffa3b5912a5607 cc @dukenv0307 # Problem There is a long chain of code that starts with `getPolicyExpenseReportOption()` accepting a string value for `privateIsArchived`. When you trace the code down through `createOption()`, you can see that `privateIsArchived` is always cast to a boolean by prepending the value with `!!`. # Solution Update the code path for this value to be a boolean all the way from the view components (use the `useReportIsArchived()` hook) down to where the value is used.
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @QichenZhu

Navigate to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Log in with new expensifail account (that does not have any bank account already added) 3. Create a new workspace 4. Set its primary currency to "AUD" 5. Navigate to Workspace settings > Workflows > Add bank account > Connect manually 6. Proceed through the bank account connection flow until you reach Step 3: Business Information (Enter random details for all the fields for step 1 and 2 which does not trigger error) 7. Enter random business name and website 8. Enter 24 302 976 253 as business registration number >> Click Next 9. Enter 24 302 976 253 as "ABN" >> Click Next 10. Click outside the RHP to close or exit the "Connect Bank Account" flow 11. Navigate to "Workspace Overview" 12. Update the currency either to "CAD", "EUR" or "GBP" ## Expected Result: User able to update currency in overview when WS has partially added non-US bank account ## Actual Result: Unable to update currency in overview when WS has partially added non-US bank account ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/16fcb70d-3e5b-4fa1-b661-691a1227dd50 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.33-1 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://test-management.browserstack.com/projects/2219752/folder/13176682/test-cases/41236556 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** rybkina+030726up@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Regression TC Execution **Device used:** iPhone 17 Pro /26.3 **App Component:** Other ## Action Performed: 1. Signup with a new Gmail account as a user with no workspace 2. Tap on FAB > Start chat > Room 3. Tap on Learn more button on "No workspace found" screen ## Expected Result: Learn more button on "No workspace found" screen should be available. ## Actual Result: The "Learn details" button is located on the "Workspace not found" screen, hidden under the keyboard. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/02253c87-8373-494a-becc-483dc10abe42 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @ChavdaSachin
